title: cyperus holstii
intro: Cyperus holstii, also known as Holst's flatsedge, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to tropical Africa, where it is commonly found growing in wetland areas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cyperus holstii include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and alleviating respiratory problems, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil for use in herbal remedies.
